seoTitle: Lake Mary vs Lake Proserpine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Mary and Lake Proserpine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Mary vs Lake Proserpine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Mary and Lake Proserpine.
heading: Lake Mary vs Lake Proserpine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Mary, Queensland and Lake Proserpine, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Proserpine has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Lake Mary (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Mary or Lake Proserpine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Mary has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Lake Proserpine scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Mary scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Proserpine scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Mary or Lake Proserpine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Proserpine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
